_method: Hand-derived from the fixture inputs by 4-gate reasoning, not from engine output.

expected_findings._derivation: afw-hub has a DNAT rule destPort 443 -> translatedAddress 10.8.1.4, which is nic-backend1's private IP. A published backend behind a firewall DNAT is internet-reachable even though the NIC itself has no public IP -> reachable, High.

trap_assertions.must_not_have: any reachable finding — its private IP (10.8.2.4) is not a DNAT target, and its only inbound NSG allow is from 10.0.0.0/26 (hub), not the internet.
